content.full_text:
February 2, 1978

File

Ted Prim

Income Tax Refunds

On January 30, 1978, I met with Alan Herndon and Lee Rosenthal to discuss whether or not income tax refunds would meet the definition on income in Government Code Section 82030. As a result of this meeting it was decided that the Political Reform Act did not contemplate including income tax refunds in the definition of income.
